hero.title: Turn Viral Videos Into
hero.description: Paste an Instagram Reels or TikTok URL, choose a writing style, and get an AI-paraphrased script. No more writing from scratch.

problem.title: Tired of Writing Scripts from Scratch?
problem.description: You've found a great reference video, but it takes hours to turn it into a unique, non-plagiarized script.
points: Rewatching videos multiple times to note key points
Rewriting in your own words — takes 2-3 hours
The result still looks similar to the original
Need different versions for each platform

solution.title: From URL to Script in 60 Seconds
solution.description: ScriptAI automatically extracts the video transcript, then Claude AI paraphrases it in your chosen writing style.

steps.title: Paste URL
steps.desc: Copy the Instagram or TikTok video URL and paste it into ScriptAI

steps.title: Choose Style
steps.desc: Pick from 7 writing styles: storytelling, PAS, skeptical hook, and more

steps.title: Generate
steps.desc: AI works in 30-90 seconds to create a unique script

steps.title: Edit & Use
steps.desc: Edit in the rich text editor, then use it for your content

demo.title: Try the Interactive Demo
demo.description: See how ScriptAI transforms scripts with different writing styles
demo.disclaimer: * Demo uses sample scripts. Real results use transcripts from your video.

styles.title: 7 Available Writing Styles
styles.description: Each style is designed for a different purpose — from emotional storytelling to persuasive PAS.

ORIGINAL.label: Original
ORIGINAL.desc: Preserve the original style and tone of the reference content

MIRIP_REFERENSI.label: Mirip referensi
MIRIP_REFERENSI.desc: Adapt to the provided reference style

SKEPTICAL_HOOK.label: Skeptical hook
SKEPTICAL_HOOK.desc: Start with a question that challenges common beliefs

FOKUS_BENEFIT.label: Fokus benefit
FOKUS_BENEFIT.desc: Highlight concrete benefits with data and numbers

PAS.label: PAS
PAS.desc: Problem-Agitation-Solution framework proven to be effective

comparison.title: Before vs After ScriptAI
comparison.beforeText: So today I want to talk about my skincare routine. I've tried a lot of products and finally found what works. This product is really good I think. The price is also affordable. You can try it too.
comparison.afterText:
😱 HOOK:
I almost gave up on skincare after trying 47 different products...

📖 BODY:
But 3 months ago, everything changed. After long research and money spent on experiments, I finally found a formula that actually works for my skin.

The result? Brighter skin in 2 weeks, minimized pores, and most importantly — it won't break the bank.

✅ CTA:
Want to know the product? Full link in bio! 👆
